---
title: "01_binning.Rmd"
output: html_document
date: "2026-07-14"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
## Binning with Metabat

Now that we have the flye assembly output, we can begin the binning process using metabat in it's own directory. 
We used grep and awk to extract the depth information before reordering the contigs based on depth with samtools and actually running metabat. 
```bash
cat ../flye/bbd/assembly_info.txt  | grep -v '#' | awk '{OFS="\t";print $1,$3}' > depths_bbd.txt

cat ../flye/depths_bbd.txt | awk '{print $1}' | xargs samtools faidx ../flye/bbd/assembly.fasta > assembly_bbd_ordered.fasta

metabat2 -i assembly_bbd_ordered.fasta -a depths_bbd.txt --cvExt -o bins_bbd/metabat --seed 5
```
